title: Iran’s New Supreme Leader Issues a Statement but Remains Unseen
summary_full: Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei has remained out of the public’s sight since assuming the post, amid reports that he was badly wounded.
summary_public: Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei has remained out of the public’s sight since assuming the post, amid reports that he was badly wounded.
